footer.disclaimer: Meeting Brain MVP. Review generated outputs before distribution.
footer.security: Frontend never exposes provider API keys.

errors.fileReadFailed: Unable to read the uploaded file.
errors.transcriptTooShort: Transcript must be at least 20 characters.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Meeting Brain processes submitted meeting content to generate structured reports. For production use, configure your LLM and email providers in Netlify environment variables and review retention policy before handling sensitive data.

terms.title: Terms
terms.body: Meeting Brain is provided as an MVP workspace. Generated outputs should be reviewed by a human before external distribution or project system import.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The route does not exist in this MVP. Core functionality lives on the main workspace.
